inputs.label: Number of Points
inputs.businessContext: Total data points to be clustered

formulas.inertia: let points = []; for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let p = []; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ p.push(Math.random()); } points.push(p); } let centroids = []; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ centroids.push(points[Math.floor(Math.random()*points.length)]); } let assignments = new Array(numPoints).fill(0); let inertia = 0; for(let iter=0; iter<maxIterations; iter++){ for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let minDist = Infinity; let bestCluster = 0; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ let dist = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ dist += (points[i][d] - centroids[k][d])**2; } dist = Math.sqrt(dist); if(dist < minDist){ minDist = dist; bestCluster = k; } } assignments[i] = bestCluster; } let newCentroids = Array.from({length: numClusters}, () => new Array(dimensions).fill(0)); let counts = new Array(numClusters).fill(0); for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let cluster = assignments[i]; counts[cluster]++; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ newCentroids[cluster][d] += points[i][d]; } } for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ if(counts[k] > 0){ for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ newCentroids[k][d] /= counts[k]; } } } let maxShift = 0; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ let shift = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ shift += (newCentroids[k][d] - centroids[k][d])**2; } shift = Math.sqrt(shift); if(shift > maxShift) maxShift = shift; } centroids = newCentroids; if(maxShift < tolerance) break; } inertia = 0; for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let cluster = assignments[i]; let dist = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ dist += (points[i][d] - centroids[cluster][d])**2; } inertia += dist; } inertia;
formulas.silhouetteScore: let points = []; for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let p = []; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ p.push(Math.random()); } points.push(p); } let centroids = []; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ centroids.push(points[Math.floor(Math.random()*points.length)]); } let assignments = new Array(numPoints).fill(0); for(let iter=0; iter<maxIterations; iter++){ for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let minDist = Infinity; let bestCluster = 0; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ let dist = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ dist += (points[i][d] - centroids[k][d])**2; } dist = Math.sqrt(dist); if(dist < minDist){ minDist = dist; bestCluster = k; } } assignments[i] = bestCluster; } let newCentroids = Array.from({length: numClusters}, () => new Array(dimensions).fill(0)); let counts = new Array(numClusters).fill(0); for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let cluster = assignments[i]; counts[cluster]++; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ newCentroids[cluster][d] += points[i][d]; } } for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ if(counts[k] > 0){ for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ newCentroids[k][d] /= counts[k]; } } } let maxShift = 0; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ let shift = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ shift += (newCentroids[k][d] - centroids[k][d])**2; } shift = Math.sqrt(shift); if(shift > maxShift) maxShift = shift; } centroids = newCentroids; if(maxShift < tolerance) break; } let silhouette = 0; for(let i=0; i<numPoints; i++){ let cluster = assignments[i]; let a = 0; let countA = 0; for(let j=0; j<numPoints; j++){ if(assignments[j] === cluster && i !== j){ let dist = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ dist += (points[i][d] - points[j][d])**2; } a += Math.sqrt(dist); countA++; } } a = countA > 0 ? a / countA : 0; let b = Infinity; for(let k=0; k<numClusters; k++){ if(k !== cluster){ let sum = 0; let count = 0; for(let j=0; j<numPoints; j++){ if(assignments[j] === k){ let dist = 0; for(let d=0; d<dimensions; d++){ dist += (points[i][d] - points[j][d])**2; } sum += Math.sqrt(dist); count++; } } let avg = count > 0 ? sum / count : 0; if(avg < b) b = avg; } } let s = (b - a) / Math.max(a, b); silhouette += s; } silhouette / numPoints;
